name: PagBrasil
description: Brazilian cross-border payment gateway specialized in local methods including Pix and boleto for international merchants.

seo.title: PagBrasil — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PagBrasil: Brazilian cross-border payment gateway specialized in local methods including Pix and boleto for international merchants.

when_to_use: Accepting Pix and boleto for international merchants entering Brazil
Cross-border card acquiring with local Brazilian acquiring rates
Offering installment plans (parcelamento) for Brazilian consumers

pros: Strong Pix and boleto local coverage
Handles FX and BR tax complexity
cons: Brazil-only inbound, not a global PSP
Dev docs less polished than domestic Pagar.me
review.verdict: Purpose-built for foreign merchants selling into Brazil, handling local methods without a BR entity.
review.best_for: International merchants needing Pix and boleto acceptance without a Brazilian entity
review.not_for: Brazilian-domestic merchants who would pay less with a local PSP
